steps: Cut tissue and grind by liquid nitrogen.
Transfer grinded tissue to 15 ml tube.
Incubate homogenate for 2 h at 56 ℃ , gently blending for every 5 ~ 10 min. 02:00:00, Incubation at 56 ℃ 00:10:00, Blending
Cool down to room temperature.
Add chloroform and isoamyl alcohol (24:1) to the supernatant, then mix.
Resuspend nuclei pellet with 0.8 X volume of frozen isopropyl alcohol.
Add 200 µl TEN and 2 µl RNAse (100 mg/ml). undetermined, TEN undetermined, RNAse (100 mg/ml)
Add buffer (TEN and 200 µl 20% SDS) and 40 µl Protease K up to 2 ml. undetermined, 20% SDS undetermined, Protease K
Add 300 µl EB (pH 8.0) to dissolve. undetermined, EB

Add 6ml TEN, 700µl 20% SDS（56℃preheat), 150µl beta mercaptoethanol and 150 µl proteinase K, rapidly mix. undetermined, TEN undetermined, 20% SDS undetermined, beta mercaptoethanol undetermined, proteinase K
Add an equal volume of Tris saturated phenol and mix.
Centrifuge at room temperature (＞16 ℃) with 14000 RPM for 10 min, then save supernatant. 00:10:00, Centrifugation
Centrifuge with 14000 RPM for 10 min, save supernatant. 00:10:00, Centrifugation
Wash with cold ethanol 75%. (1/2)
Wash with cold ethanol 75%. (2/2)
Let it dry.
37 ℃ for 30 min, incubation period precipitation with Tip dolly, precipitate dissolve completely. 00:30:00, Incubation
Incubate for 30 min at 56 ℃. 00:30:00, Incubation at 56 ℃
Add chloroform and isoamyl alcohol (24:1) to supernatant, then mix.
Centrifuge with 14000 RPM for 10 min, save supernatant. 00:10:00, Centrifugation
Resuspend nuclei pellet with 0.8 X volume of frozen isopropyl alcohol.
Wash twice with cold ethanol 75%. (1/2)
Wash twice with cold ethanol 75%. (2/2)
Let it dry.
creator: Jiang Hu
